rusty_sword.name: Rusty Sword
rusty_sword.desc: Charter issue for greenhorns — third-hand steel with one more hunt in it. Everyone's first mark falls to one of these.

iron_sword.name: Iron Sword
iron_sword.desc: Gorren's honest wood-iron. 'Out there even the rabbits belong to a king' — and this is what he arms you with anyway.

hunting_bow.name: Hunting Bow
hunting_bow.desc: A poacher's tool, turned. The Greenhoods perfected the draw; the Charter pays better for it.

longbow.name: Longbow
longbow.desc: Full-length yew for the long meadows. Kills at the range where most of the wood's problems start.

fire_staff.name: Fire Staff
fire_staff.desc: Zella's stock: fire. 'A staff decides what you are.' This one decides loudly.

frost_staff.name: Frost Staff
frost_staff.desc: Zella's stock: frost. The slow it lays is half the argument won.

heal_staff.name: Staff of Mending
heal_staff.desc: Zella's stock: mercy. The knotted druid-wood mends what the road bites.

leather_cap.name: Leather Cap
leather_cap.desc: Boiled wood-leather. Keeps off the rain and the first mistake.

iron_helm.name: Iron Helm
iron_helm.desc: Gorren's wood-iron, sized for hunters who plan to be wrong occasionally.

leather_jerkin.name: Leather Jerkin
leather_jerkin.desc: Charter field-kit: light enough to run in, thick enough to matter.

iron_cuirass.name: Iron Cuirass
iron_cuirass.desc: The plate Gorren's line used to fit on tithe-cart guards. The family improves.

leather_boots.name: Leather Boots
leather_boots.desc: Road-broken and fen-proofed. Mara chalks out more names when parties wear them.

iron_boots.name: Iron Boots
iron_boots.desc: Heavy going — but a strangler's grip finds less to strangle.

wooden_shield.name: Wooden Shield
wooden_shield.desc: Palisade oak with a company history — half of these came off Greenhoods. The Charter doesn't ask either.

iron_shield.name: Iron Shield
iron_shield.desc: A wall you can carry. Warder Bren recommends exactly this and a short memory.

lucky_locket.name: Lucky Locket
lucky_locket.desc: Somebody's luck, outlived. Coins left on the stone go missing; lockets like this turn up. Nobody asks.

wisp_talisman.name: Wisp Talisman
wisp_talisman.desc: A caged corpse-candle that has stopped trying to leave. It pulls mana the way wisps pull travelers.

greater_amulet.name: Greater Amulet
greater_amulet.desc: Fen-court work, tribute-grade. It holds a weaving the way marble holds a chisel-mark.

master_amulet.name: Master Amulet
master_amulet.desc: Rift work off the unstamped dock — the quality the Furnace-King keeps back. Takes a master's weaving.

mythic_relic.name: Mythic Relic
mythic_relic.desc: Old past arguing — the ledgers have no first entry for it. Selvara won't weave over it; the ember-witch charges double and says nothing.

bread.name: Bread
bread.desc: Mara's road-loaf. 'Bread for the road, potions for when the road bites back.'

health_potion.name: Health Potion
health_potion.desc: The red half of Mara's advice — for when the road bites back.

mana_potion.name: Mana Potion
mana_potion.desc: Zella's brew, blue as wisp-light. Casters go through crates of it.

block_planks.name: Planks
block_planks.desc: Jib's mill-planks. 'Block by block — that's how anything worth keeping gets built.'

block_log.name: Log
block_log.desc: Whole trunks off the Freehold's own clearing. The wood has no king to object.

block_cobblestone.name: Cobblestone
block_cobblestone.desc: Road-stone — the same the tithe-roads were laid with. There are better uses for it now.

block_stone_bricks.name: Stone Bricks
block_stone_bricks.desc: Dressed stone to a wall-mason's gauge. Greywatch's own wall started this way.

block_thatch.name: Thatch
block_thatch.desc: Fen-reed bundles, cut dry. A roof is a flag with weatherproofing, Jib says.

block_glass.name: Glass
block_glass.desc: Sand-fired pane glass. A window is a wall that trusts the neighbors.

block_torch.name: Torch
block_torch.desc: Pitch and wick. Warm light is the living's — post it and claim the dark back.

steel_sword.name: Steel Sword
steel_sword.desc: Fen-grade steel — Gorren's answer to marks past the dyke. Holds an edge through a wet week.

war_axe.name: Fen-Cleaver Axe
war_axe.desc: Made for the fen's court: wide, heavy, and unbothered by what serpent hide does to lesser edges.

venom_dagger.name: Weaver's Fang
venom_dagger.desc: Ground from a weaver's own fang. The poison is the point; the blade is the delivery.

ranger_crossbow.name: Marsh Ranger's Crossbow
ranger_crossbow.desc: The old fen-rangers' pattern, from when the fen had rangers. Winds fast, hits like a toll.

wisp_wand.name: Wisp Wand
wisp_wand.desc: A cold blue light on a stick — wisp-stuff bound to willow. What its bolt touches, slows.

fen_staff.name: Staff of the Fen
fen_staff.desc: Cut from something that grew below the waterline and remembers it. Zella stocks them and won't say who cuts them.

emberpike.name: Emberpike
emberpike.desc: Rift-forged on the Furnace-King's own line — a pike with a temper. Warm for weeks, like everything off the forge.

rift_greataxe.name: Riftwarden Greataxe
rift_greataxe.desc: Tribute-grade rift work — the kind stamped for the wagons north. This one never made the manifest.

gravewind_scythe.name: Gravewind Scythe
gravewind_scythe.desc: A harrower's tool at a hunter's length. The galleries cull with these; the Charter culls back.

ashen_scepter.name: Ashen Scepter
ashen_scepter.desc: Ash-wood core, ember-crystal head. It throws the rift's own weather.

tidecaller_staff.name: Tidecaller Staff
tidecaller_staff.desc: Marble-cold, salvaged from the drowned temple. It remembers the order that kept the water honest.

dwarven_arbalest.name: Dwarven Arbalest
dwarven_arbalest.desc: Pre-Dividing machine-work; nobody living makes the spring. Winds slow, argues once.

greater_health_potion.name: Greater Health Potion
greater_health_potion.desc: Mara's deep-country strength — brewed for marks past the dyke, priced accordingly.

greater_mana_potion.name: Greater Mana Potion
greater_mana_potion.desc: The ember-witch's recipe under Zella's label. Neither woman will say whose idea it was.

antidote.name: Fenleaf Antidote
antidote.desc: Chewed fenleaf in spirit — cuts poison before poison cuts you. Standard issue past the dyke.

roast_boar_leg.name: Roast Boar Leg
roast_boar_leg.desc: Poached, in both senses. Warm, heavy, and technically some king's property.

wolf_pelt.name: Wolf Pelt
wolf_pelt.desc: Bounty proof, wood mark. Winter-thick. Kess buys these.

boar_tusk.name: Boar Tusk
boar_tusk.desc: Bounty proof, wood mark. Every boar is some king's property, technically. Mara doesn't ask.

raptor_talon.name: Raptor Talon
raptor_talon.desc: Bounty proof, sand mark. The pride runs raptors as beaters. The Charter pays for fewer beaters.

slime_gel.name: Slime Gel
slime_gel.desc: Bounty proof, wood mark. Pays better if it hasn't leaked.

venom_sac.name: Venom Sac
venom_sac.desc: Bounty proof off Veshka's brood. Do not squeeze.

ember_core.name: Ember Core
ember_core.desc: Proof off the forge-dead. Warm for weeks.

spirit_essence.name: Spirit Essence
spirit_essence.desc: Proof off the galleries' workforce. It pulls faintly toward the down-shaft. Sell it before it decides.

ancient_coin.name: Ancient Coin
ancient_coin.desc: Sekhat's mint. The sands paid in these, until the sands were the payment.

bone_charm.name: Bone Charm
bone_charm.desc: Bounty proof from the tithe-road down. Kess won't touch them.

block_dark_bricks.name: Dark Bricks
block_dark_bricks.desc: Deep-work brick in the crypt style. Jib stocks it and declines to say who quarries it.

block_marble.name: Marble
block_marble.desc: Temple-grade marble, pale as the drowned order that loved it.

block_lantern.name: Lantern
block_lantern.desc: A lamplighter's lantern, wick trimmed. One lit lamp on a dark road means somebody is still paying attention.

block_palisade.name: Palisade
block_palisade.desc: Sharpened posts, company pattern. The Greenhoods build good fences; the Charter builds them facing the other way.

block_hay.name: Hay Bale
block_hay.desc: Winter fodder by the bale. The tithe-pen never stays full long.

block_iron_bars.name: Iron Bars
block_iron_bars.desc: Honest bars. Some things are for keeping out; down the crypt stair, some were for keeping in.

block_bookshelf.name: Bookshelf
block_bookshelf.desc: Shelving to a ledger-house gauge. The world before wrote everything down; somebody should again.

kingsrend_greataxe.name: Kingsrend Greataxe
kingsrend_greataxe.desc: Royal work — Valdrenn steel that remembers being a country. Gorren goes quiet when one crosses his counter.

oathbreaker_pike.name: Oathbreaker Pike
oathbreaker_pike.desc: A sentinel's pike, its oath finally void. It held the day-nine line; now it holds yours.

sovereign_scythe.name: Sovereign Scythe
sovereign_scythe.desc: Court steel from the fallen capital, made for ceremony and never told the difference.

scepter_of_ruin.name: Scepter of Ruin
scepter_of_ruin.desc: A scepter off the court of the second dead king. What it commands now is ruin, which is what's left.

undertide_beak_shard.name: Undertide Beak Shard
undertide_beak_shard.desc: A flake off the thing that drank a sea. Proof enough for anyone.

greenhood_ledger_page.name: Greenhood Ledger Page
greenhood_ledger_page.desc: Bounty proof — and evidence. Corvyn will want to read it first.

strangler_heartroot.name: Strangler Heartroot
strangler_heartroot.desc: Proof. Still moving. Sell it quickly.

kiln_gallstone.name: Kiln Gallstone
kiln_gallstone.desc: A gut-stone off the Furnace-King's oldest mouth. Gorren will pay to study the alloy.

war_medal.name: War Medal
war_medal.desc: Bounty proof, and a man's whole war. The Charter pays either way.

royal_seal.name: Royal Seal of Valdrenn
royal_seal.desc: Valdrenn's own. Forty years void; worth more that way.

sundered_crown.name: The Sundered Crown
sundered_crown.desc: The crown of the last man who was ever a king. Everyone understands why the Charter overpays.

the_winter_tithe.name: The Winter Tithe
the_winter_tithe.desc: What the First was owed. Paid in full, at last, in the only coin that was ever going to settle it.

wallbreaker_clasp.name: Wallbreaker's Yoke-Clasp
wallbreaker_clasp.desc: Off the yoke of the beast that broke Valdrenn's gates. Gorren can't name the metal. The Charter pays anyway.

unfinished_sigil.name: The Unfinished Sigil
unfinished_sigil.desc: A king's seal, half-engraved. The Charter pays double for questions this good.

osmunds_gauntlet.name: Ser Osmund's Gauntlet
osmunds_gauntlet.desc: Ser Osmund's. He held the door forty years past the end of it. Maera wrote down the part that mattered.

spiral_horn.name: Aelthir's Spiral Horn
spiral_horn.desc: Aelthir's. Mara won't buy it. Mara won't say why.
